master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set in Café Aurora after closing time on a rainy night. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, cozy but tense, warm and inviting, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Café Aurora is an elegant café with dark polished wood, burgundy walls, warm amber lighting, cream highlights, brass details, rain-covered windows, soft reflections, and a sophisticated Brazilian urban café mood. Color palette: deep burgundy #6E1F2B, dark wine #4A111B, warm gold #C49A4A, warm cream #F7F1E7, dark charcoal #241C1A, dark polished wood #3A2418, amber café light #B16A2C, muted blue-gray rain shadows, soft golden reflections. Lighting: warm amber interior lamps, cinematic low-light, soft directional highlights, deep but elegant burgundy shadows, subtle rain reflections on glass and polished wood, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, subtle film grain, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”. Show the interior of Café Aurora after closing time on a rainy night. The main focus is Mesa 7: a small round dark wooden table near a large rain-covered window. On the table there is a folded handwritten note, a dark ceramic coffee cup on a saucer, a blue pen, and a neatly folded cream napkin. The note is the central mystery object and should clearly contain the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” written in blue ink. The phrase should appear as natural handwriting on the paper, not as a digital text overlay. The café around it is quiet, elegant and warm, with burgundy walls, dark wood furniture, amber lamps, subtle brass details, and rain reflections outside the window. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the table and note slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the rainy window behind the table to create depth, with soft bokeh streetlights outside. No people in the foreground. Mood: warm, refined, intimate, mysterious, literary, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”. Show a dark polished wooden café table with a folded handwritten note in the foreground, a blue pen beside it, and a dark ceramic coffee cup partially visible nearby. The note should clearly contain the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” written in blue ink. The phrase should appear naturally on the paper, not as digital overlay text. The background should be softly blurred, with warm amber café lights and rain bokeh through a window. The folded note should be the clearest focal point and must remain readable as an important object even at small mobile thumbnail size. Composition: square close-up still life, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between warm cream paper and dark wood. Mood: warm, intimate, suspicious, elegant, literary.

mesa_7.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Mesa 7” inside Café Aurora. Show a small round dark wooden table near a large rain-covered window after closing time. The table should feel like a specific place the viewer can investigate. On the table: a folded handwritten note, a cold dark ceramic coffee cup on a saucer, a neatly folded cream napkin, and a blue pen. The note should visibly contain the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” written in blue ink, as natural handwriting on the paper, not as a text overlay. The rainy window is close behind the table, with blurred golden streetlights and soft reflections on the glass. The café interior should include burgundy walls, dark wood furniture, warm amber lamps, and refined vintage details. Composition: the table is the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding café context to establish the location. A subtle brass table number “7” may appear naturally on the table edge or a small table marker if it renders cleanly. Mood: quiet, suspicious, warm, elegant, investigative. Important visual clues: table near the window, folded note with the phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.”, blue pen, coffee cup, napkin, rain on glass.

balcao.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Balcão” inside Café Aurora after closing time. Show an elegant café counter made of polished dark wood. On and around the counter: a closed cash register, an espresso machine, neatly stacked cups, order slips, a worn black pen used by the waiter, and a small warm lamp. The scene should feel clean and orderly, but slightly tense, as if something important happened near the register. The background may include a softly blurred café menu board, shelves, cups, and warm amber lights. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the cash register and order slips clearly visible, but not overly dramatic. The black pen should be noticeable enough to function as a clue. Mood: orderly, warm, refined, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: cash register, espresso machine, order slips, black pen, dark polished counter, amber lamp.

area_externa.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Área externa” outside Café Aurora at night after rain. Show the exterior entrance of an elegant Brazilian-inspired café. The sidewalk is wet and reflective, catching warm golden light from the windows. The café has dark wood doors, large glowing windows, a burgundy awning, brass details, and a discreet sign that may read “Café Aurora” only if rendered cleanly and naturally. Near the entrance there is a metal umbrella stand with several umbrellas. Through the window, suggest that Mesa 7 can be partially seen from outside, creating a sense that someone could have observed something. Composition: slight angled view of the façade, with wet street reflections leading the eye toward the warm interior. The umbrella stand should be visible near the door. Mood: rainy, warm, elegant, quiet, cinematic, subtly suspicious. Important visual clues: wet sidewalk, warm interior through windows, umbrella stand, partial view into the café, rain reflections.

bilhete.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Bilhete”, the central clue in the mystery. Show a folded, slightly handled paper note on a dark polished wooden café table. The paper looks simple, torn from a small notepad, with subtle creases, softened edges, and small marks from being handled. The note must clearly contain the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” written in blue ink. The phrase is the emotional center of the story and should be readable, natural, and integrated into the paper as handwriting, not as digital overlay text. A dark coffee cup and warm amber café reflections should appear softly blurred in the background. Composition: close-up still life, the folded note dominates the frame, with paper texture and blue ink clearly visible. Mood: intimate, suspicious, elegant, important.

xicara.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Xícara” from the Mesa 7 location. Show a dark ceramic coffee cup on a saucer sitting on a polished wooden café table near a rain-covered window. There is a small amount of cold coffee left inside, with subtle residue visible. Warm amber light reflects softly on the cup, saucer, and table surface. The folded note may appear blurred in the background, but the cup must be the main focus; if the note is visible, only a partial hint of the blue handwritten phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” may appear out of focus. Composition: square close-up still life, shallow depth of field, elegant material detail, warm highlights against dark wood. The cup should feel recently used but not obviously central to the mystery, like a subtle red herring. Mood: quiet, warm, elegant, slightly suspicious.

guardanapo.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Guardanapo” from the Mesa 7 location. Show a neatly folded warm cream napkin on a dark polished café table. It sits near the edge of a coffee cup and a partially visible handwritten note, but the napkin is the focus. The nearby note may partially reveal the handwritten blue-ink Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.”, but it should remain secondary and partially out of focus. The napkin appears ordinary, clean, carefully placed, and refined, more like part of the table setting than a major clue. Composition: square close-up still life, minimal and elegant, with soft amber lighting, gentle shadows, and visible dark wood texture. Mood: quiet, refined, possibly suspicious but ultimately ordinary.

caixa.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caixa”, the café cash register. Show an elegant closed cash register on a polished dark wooden counter inside Café Aurora after closing time. Nearby there are order slips, a warm small lamp, stacked cups, and an espresso machine softly visible in the background. The register should feel important and slightly suspicious, but not dramatic or criminal. The counter is tidy with subtle signs of recent use. Composition: medium close-up, the cash register is the central object, with surrounding café elements providing context. Use warm amber light, dark wood reflections, and soft burgundy shadows. Mood: quiet tension, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: cash register, order slips, espresso machine, warm lamp, dark wood counter.

caneta_preta_rafa.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caneta preta de Rafa”. Show a worn black pen lying beside café order slips on the polished wooden counter at Café Aurora. The pen looks practical, ordinary, and used daily by a waiter. Nearby there may be a small stack of command sheets, a receipt pad, or a metal cup with other pens, but the black pen must be the clear focal point. Composition: square close-up still life, warm amber café light, dark wood surface, soft shadows, realistic textures. The image should help the viewer understand that this black pen does not match the blue ink of the anonymous note. Mood: ordinary but investigative, subtle red herring, realistic café routine.

caneta_azul_davi.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caneta azul de Davi”. Show a blue pen resting on handwritten music sheets, chords or lyrics on a dark café table. The papers look like notes from a musician’s performance at Café Aurora. A guitar pick, the edge of an acoustic guitar case, or part of a music notebook may appear softly blurred in the background. The blue pen should look ordinary but important, visually connecting Davi to the blue ink of the anonymous note. Composition: square close-up still life, blue pen as the clear focal point, shallow depth of field, warm amber café lighting, burgundy shadows, dark wood surface. Mood: calm, artistic, suspicious, elegant. Important visual clues: blue pen, music notes or chord sheets, musician context.

suporte_guarda_chuvas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Suporte de guarda-chuvas” near Café Aurora’s entrance. Show a metal umbrella stand beside the entrance of an elegant café at night after rain. Several umbrellas are inside the stand. The nearby floor is slightly wet from the rainy sidewalk, with soft golden reflections from the café interior. The door, window glow, and rain outside can be softly visible in the background. Composition: square medium close-up, umbrella stand as the main focus, with enough entrance context to establish location. Mood: warm, rainy, subtle, investigative. Important visual clues: umbrella stand, wet floor, café entrance, warm interior light.

janela.prompt: Create a close-up location-object image for “Janela” near Mesa 7. Show a large café window covered in rain droplets at night. Through the glass, warm streetlights create soft golden reflections and blurred shapes. The interior edge of Mesa 7 may be partially visible in the foreground or reflected faintly in the glass, possibly including a blurred glimpse of the anonymous note with blue handwriting. The image should communicate reflection, ambiguity, and the possibility that someone outside could have seen something. Composition: focus on rain-covered glass, layered reflections, and shallow depth of field. Use warm amber interior tones, dark burgundy shadows, and muted blue-gray rain outside. Mood: quiet, reflective, mysterious, elegant.

guarda_chuva_clara.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Guarda-chuva de Clara”. Show an elegant compact umbrella near the entrance of Café Aurora, placed in or beside the umbrella stand. The entrance floor nearby shows subtle wet reflections from the recent rain, but Clara’s umbrella itself looks unusually dry and clean. The umbrella should feel refined, tasteful, and connected to Clara’s elegant style. Composition: square medium close-up, umbrella as the clear focus, with wet floor reflections and warm café light around it to make the dryness subtly suspicious. Use dark burgundy shadows, amber highlights, and polished material detail. Mood: elegant, quiet contradiction, suspicious but not obvious.

elisa.prompt: Create a character portrait for Elisa, owner of Café Aurora. Elisa is a Brazilian adult woman in her late 30s or early 40s. She is practical, composed, proud of her café, and visibly tense after finding the anonymous note. She wants answers without creating a scandal. Appearance: elegant but practical café owner, refined casual clothing, perhaps a dark blouse with a tailored apron. Her hair is neat but slightly loosened after a long workday. Her expression is controlled, worried, alert, and responsible. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, warm café interior softly blurred in the background. Use amber light on one side of her face and soft burgundy shadows on the other. She should look human, believable, emotionally grounded, and not villainous. Mood: composed tension, responsibility, quiet worry, restrained authority.

clara.prompt: Create a character portrait for Clara, the last customer of Café Aurora. Clara is an elegant adult woman, refined, defensive, impatient, and controlled. She uses a subtle citrus perfume and appears socially polished, but her posture suggests she is protecting something. She is not cartoonishly villainous; she is dignified, uncomfortable under pressure, and careful with her words. Appearance: stylish adult woman, refined outfit, elegant coat or blouse, subtle jewelry, well-kept hair. Expression: controlled, slightly defensive, raised chin, guarded eyes. Pose may include crossed arms or a tense posture. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, softly blurred Café Aurora interior behind her, burgundy walls and amber lights. Mood: defensive elegance, restrained guilt, social discomfort, polished tension.

rafa.prompt: Create a character portrait for Rafa, the waiter at Café Aurora. Rafa is a young adult café waiter, anxious, sympathetic, and defensive. He is nervous because he fears being accused unfairly. He works near the counter and uses a black pen for order slips. He is a false suspect, not a criminal. Appearance: young adult Brazilian man, simple café uniform or dark apron, clean but slightly messy after a long shift. He may hold a small order pad or a black pen. Expression: anxious, earnest, overwhelmed, trying hard to explain himself. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, warm café counter softly blurred in the background, amber light, dark wood, burgundy shadows. Mood: nervous innocence, vulnerability, tension, relatable humanity.

davi.prompt: Create a character portrait for Davi, the musician at Café Aurora. Davi is an adult musician who performed at the café. He is calm, observant, evasive, and morally conflicted. He carries a blue pen to write music notes. He wrote the anonymous note with the phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” to pressure Clara, but avoids direct confrontation. Appearance: adult Brazilian man, thoughtful expression, calm eyes, understated artistic style. He may have an acoustic guitar case, music sheets, or a blue pen subtly visible. He should look introspective and emotionally complex, not obviously suspicious. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, warm Café Aurora background softly blurred, amber light, burgundy shadows, possible music sheets behind him. Mood: quiet observation, moral hesitation, artistic restraint, hidden knowledge.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”. Show Café Aurora after the mystery is resolved. Mesa 7 near the rainy window is quiet and still. On the table: the anonymous folded note clearly showing the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” in blue ink, the blue pen, a small key to the cash drawer, and an empty dark coffee cup. The phrase should appear naturally written on the paper, not as digital overlay text. Rain continues outside, but the atmosphere feels calmer and more reflective. The café remains warm, elegant, and intimate, with amber light and burgundy shadows softened by resolution. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the objects that symbolize the truth: note, blue pen, cash drawer key, empty cup. The rain-covered window should be visible in the background. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”. Show Mesa 7 near the rainy window inside Café Aurora. The anonymous note remains partially folded but should still reveal part or all of the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” in blue ink. The blue pen lies nearby, suggesting that part of the truth was uncovered. The cash register, cash drawer, or Clara’s secret should remain outside the frame or hidden in shadow, creating a sense of unresolved tension. The café is still warm and elegant, but the edges of the image are darker and more uncertain. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the note and blue pen, deeper shadows around the frame, rainy window in the background. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “O Bilhete na Mesa 7”. Show an empty Café Aurora table after closing time, with the anonymous note still left behind and unresolved. The note should clearly or partially show the handwritten Portuguese phrase “Eu sei o que você fez ontem.” in blue ink, reminding the viewer that the central mystery was not properly solved. The lighting is warm but heavier with shadows. A dark coffee cup sits nearby, untouched or forgotten. Rain outside the window feels stronger and lonelier, with blurred golden reflections on the glass. The scene should suggest that the truth was missed and the mystery remains uncomfortable, without becoming scary. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the note left slightly off-center on the dark wooden table, rainy window behind it, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary.
